_publications._publicationTitle: [18F]fluorothymidine and [18F]fluorodeoxyglucose PET Imaging Demonstrates Uptake and Differentiates Growth in Neurofibromatosis 2 Related Vestibular Schwannoma.

_contextSnippet: Overall, FDG displayed higher AUC values than FLT (0.750–0.893 vs 0.643–0.857)
details: FDG AUC ROC values ranged from 0.750-0.893 for discriminating rapidly growing from indolent tumors
